title: Registration form validation error
description: Users receive validation errors even when entering correct information.

title: Order history not displaying
description: Customer order history page shows empty results.

title: Notification badge not updating
description: Unread notification count remains unchanged after viewing messages.

title: File upload exceeding limit
description: System blocks uploads even when file size is under the allowed limit.

title: Product images not loading
description: Several product images fail to load on the catalog page.

title: Checkout button unresponsive
description: Clicking the checkout button does not redirect to the payment page.

title: User profile update failed
description: Changes to user profiles are not saved after submission.

title: Broken link in footer section
description: Privacy policy link leads to a missing page.

title: Multi-language switch not working
description: Language toggle does not update text across the website.

title: Reports page loading slowly
description: Analytics reports take more than 20 seconds to load.

title: Two-factor authentication error
description: Verification code is rejected even when entered correctly.

title: Cart items disappear after refresh
description: Items added to the cart are removed when the page reloads.

title: Theme settings not saved
description: Dark mode preference resets after logging out.

title: Search suggestions not appearing
description: Autocomplete suggestions do not show while typing in search bar.

title: API rate limit exceeded frequently
description: System exceeds API request limits causing service interruptions.
